svg.title: kastellan — Security Architecture (with CASSANDRA)
svg.desc: Defence-in-depth layers: channel ingress, agent core, CASSANDRA plan review pipeline, dispatcher chokepoint, sandboxed tool workers, egress proxy, Postgres with isolated roles, four-tier response model, and five constitutional principles.
svg.text: Defence in depth: mechanical sandbox layers + CASSANDRA semantic oversight
HOST · single Linux/macOS user account · all process boundaries below run as this user
AGENT CORE (Rust, in-process · the security boundary)
independent reviewer · plan-level review · runtime verification · own Postgres role unreachable by the agent
verdict history · pattern watches · data lineage · agent behaviour
agent has no read or write access
each tool call must match an approved plan step
sole site that authors WorkerCommand · sole policy/audit point · runtime verification hook
TOOL WORKERS · one OS process per worker · one sandbox per worker
channel adapter → agent core → CASSANDRA pipeline → dispatcher chokepoint → parent-side sandbox → worker-side sandbox → cgroup cap → egress proxy
